attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ORG_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.LABOR_COSTING_RULE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.COST_RATE_SCH_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.FORECAST_COST_RATE_SCH_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.OVERTIME_PROJECT_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.OVERTIME_TASK_ID, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ACCT_RATE_DATE_CODE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ACCT_RATE_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ACCT_EXCHANGE_RATE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.START_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.END_DATE_ACTIVE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.CREATION_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.CREATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE,
(
select ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE
minus
select ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE
) ACM
where 
 ACM.ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE_ID = STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CSF_PA_ORG_LABOR_SCH_RULE.REFRESH_DATETIME
